use std::path::Component;
use walkdir::WalkDir;

fn find_matching(root: &str, needle: &str) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for entry in WalkDir::new(root) {
        let entry = entry.unwrap();
        let matches = entry.path().components().any(|c| match c {
            Component::Normal(s) => s.to_string_lossy().contains(needle),
            _ => false,
        });
        if matches {
            results.push(entry.path().to_string_lossy().to_string());
        }
    }
    results
}
